name: feature-flags
description: Private monorepo workspace — publishable packages live under packages/ (@kmohitk/*). Do not npm publish this root.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
node -e "console.error('
This root package is not published. From the repo root run:
  pnpm run publish:packages
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kmohitk/core build && pnpm --filter @kmohitk/cli build && pnpm --filter @kmohitk/sdk build
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @kmohitk/core publish --access public && pnpm --filter @kmohitk/cli publish --access public && pnpm --filter @kmohitk/sdk publish --access public
